name: F4 Uranium Corp.
description: F4 Uranium Corp., formerly Fission 4.0 Corp., is a Canadian uranium exploration company focused on acquiring and developing high-grade uranium properties in the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan, Canada. The company holds a portfolio of highly prospective uranium projects, including the Patterson Lake North (PLN) project, which is located near major high-grade uranium discoveries. F4 Uranium utilizes advanced exploration techniques and is led by an experienced management and technical team with a track record of uranium discovery success.
